llm_verdict.message:
<tool_call>
{"name": "review_plan", "arguments": {"plan_description": "Remediate the umask finding by following the recommended remediation script structure. The plan: 1) Verify kernel-core is installed with rpm -q kernel-core, 2) Set var_accounts_user_umask='027', 3) Find all profile files using find /etc/profile.d/ -type f -name '*.sh' -or -name 'sh.local', 4) For each file (including /etc/profile), check if umask exists with grep -qE '^[^#]*umask', 5) If exists, modify in-place with sed -i -E \"s/^(\s*umask\s*)[0-7]+/\1$var_accounts_user_umask/g\", 6) If no umask found in any file, append \"umask $var_accounts_user_umask\" to /etc/profile. This follows the recommended script exactly, uses the variable approach, processes all profile files dynamically, and avoids hardcoding specific filenames."}}
</tool_call>
